_INSTRUCTIONS: Insert the 'capability-curator-weekly-scan' object below into the 'tasks' object in .claude/scheduled-tasks-state.json (anywhere in tasks; suggest after 'weekly-health-check' for readability). ALSO add the string 'capability-curator-weekly-scan' to the priority_order array, right after 'weekly-health-check'. Backup first: cp .claude/scheduled-tasks-state.json .claude/scheduled-tasks-state.json.bak-2026-04-29

capability-curator-weekly-scan.description: Weekly capability lifecycle scan. PART 1: Enumerate .claude/skills/ (find -name SKILL.md), compare to .claude/skills-registry.md. If drift detected, regenerate registry, flag constitutional skills. PART 2: Enumerate tools/ directory and compare to tools-registry.md (build it on first run if missing). PART 3: Check Anthropic skills repo (anthropics/anthropic-skills) and 'Claude skills' announcements via WebSearch for new/updated/deprecated skills. PART 4: Generate to-jared/SKILLS-DIGEST-{date}.md if changes found; brief 'no significant changes' note if quiet. PART 5: If breaking changes or new constitutional-relevant skills detected, escalate via human-liaison. Coordinate manifest changes ONLY with agent-architect (never unilateral).

_VALIDATION: After insert, run: python3 -m json.tool .claude/scheduled-tasks-state.json > /dev/null && echo OK
